sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111389" key="filopla/tanos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-πλάτᾰνος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[πλᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n111389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Plane-lover,</tr_> name of a lover, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
